languages.text: "Почему вас столь заботит исцеление трона от машинной хвори?"

traits.locale_text: "Почему вас столь заботит исцеление трона от машинной хвори?"

languages.text: "Why do you care so much about curing the throne's machine sickness?"
languages.original_text: "Почему вас столь заботит исцеление трона от машинной хвори?"

traits.locale_text: "Why do you care so much about curing the throne's machine sickness?"
"Why do you care so much about curing the throne's machine sickness?"
"Why do you care so much about curing the throne's machine sickness?"

languages.text: “你为什么如此执着于治好这王座的机械病症？”
languages.original_text: "Why do you care so much about curing the throne's machine sickness?"

traits.locale_text: “你为什么如此执着于治好这王座的机械病症？”

languages.text: «¿Por qué tiene tanto interés en curar la enfermedad de la maquinaria del trono?».
languages.original_text: "Why do you care so much about curing the throne's machine sickness?"

traits.locale_text: «¿Por qué tiene tanto interés en curar la enfermedad de la maquinaria del trono?».

languages.text: « Pourquoi tenez-vous tant à soigner le fauteuil de son mal mécanique ? »
languages.original_text: "Why do you care so much about curing the throne's machine sickness?"

traits.locale_text: « Pourquoi tenez-vous tant à soigner le fauteuil de son mal mécanique ? »

languages.text: "Warum liegt Euch so viel daran, die Maschinenkrankheit des Throns zu heilen?"
languages.original_text: "Why do you care so much about curing the throne's machine sickness?"

traits.locale_text: "Warum liegt Euch so viel daran, die Maschinenkrankheit des Throns zu heilen?"

languages.text: "Tahtın makine hastalığını iyileştirmeyi neden bu kadar önemsiyorsun?"
languages.original_text: "Why do you care so much about curing the throne's machine sickness?"

traits.locale_text: "Tahtın makine hastalığını iyileştirmeyi neden bu kadar önemsiyorsun?"

languages.text: 「なぜ、王座の機械病を治すことにそんなにこだわるのですか？」
languages.original_text: "Why do you care so much about curing the throne's machine sickness?"

traits.locale_text: 「なぜ、王座の機械病を治すことにそんなにこだわるのですか？」
